Reviews Contact

Our Services

Professional auto-body solutions for every need

Collision Repair

Complete restoration after accidents, from fender benders to major impacts.

Learn More →

Paintless Dent Repair

Affordable hail damage and dent removal without repainting.

Learn More →

Rust Repair

Stop Wisconsin salt damage before it spreads.

Learn More →

Frame Straightening

Precision correction for Milwaukee's worst crashes.

Learn More →

Bumper Repair

Affordable fixes for parking lot scrapes and winter bumps.

Learn More →
Summit Auto Body

Trusted auto body professionals serving Milwaukee, WI and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
